panels.title: Ships Now
panels.description: Unique vessels seen in the last 60 seconds

targets.rawSql: SELECT uniq(mmsi) as count FROM ais.positions WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 60 SECOND

panels.title: Messages / min
panels.description: AIS messages received per minute (last 5 min avg)

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() / 5 as msg_per_min FROM ais.positions WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE
SELECT uniq(mmsi) as count FROM ais.positions WHERE timestamp > today()
SELECT count() as total FROM ais.positions WHERE timestamp > today()
SELECT toStartOfFiveMinutes(timestamp) AS time, uniq(mmsi) AS ships FROM ais.positions WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT toStartOfMinute(timestamp) AS time, count() AS messages FROM ais.positions WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Ship Types
panels.description: Vessel types seen (from static data messages)

targets.rawSql: SELECT multiIf(ship_type >= 70 AND ship_type <= 79, 'Cargo', ship_type >= 80 AND ship_type <= 89, 'Tanker', ship_type >= 60 AND ship_type <= 69, 'Passenger', ship_type >= 40 AND ship_type <= 49, 'High-speed craft', ship_type >= 30 AND ship_type <= 39, 'Fishing', ship_type >= 50 AND ship_type <= 59, 'Special craft', ship_type = 0, 'Unknown', toString(ship_type)) AS type_name, uniq(mmsi) AS count FROM ais.positions WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND ship_type IS NOT NULL AND ship_type > 0 GROUP BY type_name ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT mmsi, anyLast(ship_name) AS name, anyLast(callsign) AS callsign, round(anyLast(speed), 1) AS speed_kts, round(anyLast(course), 0) AS course_deg, round(anyLast(lat), 4) AS lat, round(anyLast(lon), 4) AS lon, count() AS msgs, max(timestamp) AS last_seen FROM ais.positions WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 30 MINUTE GROUP BY mmsi ORDER BY last_seen DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT speed FROM ais.positions WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND speed IS NOT NULL AND speed > 0 AND speed < 50

panels.title: Speed Traces (Top 5 Ships)
panels.description: Speed over time for the 5 most active vessels in the last hour

targets.rawSql: WITH top_ships AS (SELECT mmsi FROM ais.positions WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND speed IS NOT NULL GROUP BY mmsi ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 5) SELECT timestamp AS time, speed AS value, concat(toString(mmsi), coalesce(concat(' (', ship_name, ')'), '')) AS metric FROM ais.positions WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND mmsi IN (SELECT mmsi FROM top_ships) AND speed IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time
